data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for a deterministic correction model.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the deterministic correction model, but the evidence provided does not explicitly confirm this requirement. While there are multiple successful prior steps related to bookings and member actions, none of them provide direct evidence that the correction model adheres to the specified criteria of 'append/reverse, no history overwrite'. The linked use case mentions the need for this model but does not demonstrate its fulfillment in the current saga run.
gaps: No evidence confirming that the correction model is deterministic and adheres to the specified criteria.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the deterministic correction model.
